agentPort.Name: Agent Port
agentPort.Hint: WebSocket port the local FAB agent listens on (default 7777).

agentToken.Name: Agent Token
agentToken.Hint: Shared secret for authenticating the Foundry module to the local agent. Must match the FAB_AGENT_TOKEN env var on the agent side.

autoCommit.Name: Auto-Commit
autoCommit.Hint: If enabled, generated drafts are committed to the world without showing a preview. Use with care.

defaultModel.Name: Default Model
defaultModel.Hint: Optional LLM model override. Empty = use the agent's default. Examples: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514, openai/gpt-4o.

Designer.Title: AI Designer (Campaign Codex)
Designer.Prompt: Describe what you want to create
Designer.PromptPlaceholder: Example: A smuggler's tavern in a port city, run by a half-elf who lost a hand to the guard captain...
Designer.RefinePlaceholder: Suggest a change to the current draft...

AgentStatus.Disconnected: Not connected — start the agent (uv run fab-agent)

Errors.NotConnected: Cannot reach the local agent. See console for details.
Errors.NoCC: Campaign Codex is not enabled. The AI Designer requires it.
Errors.InvalidResponse: The agent returned an invalid response. See console.
Errors.NoPrompt: Please describe what you want to create.
